title: Alebrije Event Envelope v1
description: Base envelope shared by every event that travels the Alebrije EventBus. Per-event schemas use allOf + $ref to inherit these fields and constrain event_type + data.

event_id.description: UUID (preferably v7) uniquely identifying this event. Used for dedupe.

event_version.description: Schema version (major.minor) matching the .vN file suffix.

tenant_id.description: Tenant that owns this event. Present in every event without exception (ADR-25).

external_ref.description: Correlation ID for callback events. Required in notifications.*.delivered and other callback events where the caller must echo the reference it sent on the original request.

sender_type.description: Identity class of the party that originated the interaction (AQ-112). Resolved from the conversation in WhatsApp-origin producers (sender_type column on omnichannel.conversations). Nullable + optional for backward compatibility: events emitted before AQ-112, or where identity is not yet resolved, omit it.

branch_id.description: Multi-context selector for the originating branch (AQ-112). Maps to context_id on omnichannel.conversations. Nullable + optional for backward compatibility; distinct from the envelope-level context_id which is the routing context.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the event occurred (producer clock).

service.description: Deployment name of the emitting service (e.g. alebrije-mod-rewards-go).

version.description: Image tag / app version of the emitting service.

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace id for cross-service correlation (32 hex chars).

data.description: Per-event payload. Shape is defined by the per-event schema that refs this envelope.
